mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, type, attach_path, top_flag, publisher_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{attachPath}, #{topFlag}, #{publisherId})
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title=#{title}, content=#{content}, type=#{type}, attach_path=#{attachPath}, top_flag=#{topFlag}, update_time=NOW() WHERE notice_id=#{noticeId} AND is_deleted=0
UPDATE notice SET is_deleted=1, delete_time=NOW() WHERE notice_id=#{noticeId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notice WHERE notice_id=#{noticeId} AND is_deleted=0
SELECT n.*, t.teacher_name AS publisher_name FROM notice n LEFT JOIN teacher t ON n.publisher_id = t.teacher_id WHERE n.notice_id=#{noticeId} AND n.is_deleted=0
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET top_flag=#{topFlag}, update_time=NOW() WHERE notice_id=#{noticeId}
